title: GAFS
text: Home * Knowledge * Endgame Tablebases * GAFS GAFS , (Guido Antonelli Finali di Scacchi) a chess endgame tablebase generator by Guido Antonelli for six and more pieces with a command line interface running under Linux , first released in June 2006 [1] . To use the generated TBs in a chess engine, a library (gafslib.o) is provided for Unix /Linux and Windows 32 , with two entry points, initialization and probing [2] .
